pages.text: The $(item)End City Skyseed$() — the End's grand prize, the way the Mansion and Bastion crown their chapters. Plant it for a $(o)purpur tower$() with a cantilevered $(o)End ship$() on an end-stone island, $(item)shulkers$() drifting around it.$(br2)$(bold)Where to look$()$(br)Work up to it from chorus islands — a $(item)Forest$() or $(item)Lush$() seed's End form, or your own $(item)Chorus Forest$(). Smelt chorus to $(item)purpur$(), and the rare $(item)shulker$() that drifts onto those islands drops the $(item)shells$(). Gather enough of both and you can seed your own city.
Shulker shells and end stone, framed in purpur.

$(bold)The spoils$()$(br)The tower's chest rolls $(item)End City treasure$() — diamonds, enchanted gear, emeralds. Climb the ladder to the deck: the ship's chest holds the chapter's reward, a guaranteed $(item)elytra$(). And the resident $(item)shulkers$() are a renewable source of $(item)shells$() → $(item)shulker boxes$().

$(bold)Mind the shulkers$()$(br)They levitate you — over the void, that is a long way down. Pick them off from cover, or bring a bucket of water to break your fall. A $(item)Return Portal Seed$() in your pack is cheap insurance.
